signals.headline: South Korea's annual inflation rose to 2
signals.raw:
South Korea's annual inflation rose to 2.2% in March 2026 (from 2.0% prior), below market forecasts of 2.4%** | NO | HIGH confidence[1]

This March figure—released around early April 2026 via Statistics Korea—marks the latest confirmed data point amid Middle East-driven energy volatility, but it beat expectations downward and aligns with the Bank of Korea's 2.2% yearly outlook (up slightly from 2.
